description_full:
Bist du bereit, die Lücke zwischen Product und Markt zu schließen?

Bei Wemolo leben wir #own(y)ourgrowth – mit einer klaren Vision, viel Gestaltungsspielraum und einem Umfeld, in dem Innovation und persönliche Entwicklung Hand in Hand gehen. Als eines der am schnellsten wachsenden Scale-ups in Deutschland revolutionieren wir das Parkraummanagement durch smarte Software und AI-gestützte Technologie.

Die Challenge: Neue Features werden gebaut, aber noch nicht konsequent in Umsatz übersetzt. Produktwissen erreicht das Sales-Team oft unvollständig, und Marktfeedback kommt zu spät im Product-Team an.

Deine Rolle: Als GTM Enablement Manager (all genders) bist du das bindende Glied zwischen Product und Commercial. Verankert im Business Development Team sorgst du für ein nahtloses Zusammenspiel und treibst gleichzeitig strategische Themen voran, die das Wachstum von Wemolo direkt beeinflussen.

What To Expect


Schnittstellen-Ownership: Du verantwortest die Schnittstelle zwischen Commercial und Product – von der strukturierten Bedarfsanalyse im Sales-Team bis zur priorisierten Übergabe an das Produktmanagement sowie den Rückfluss an Sales
Roadmap & Marktfeedback: Du stellst sicher, dass Kunden- und Marktfeedback direkt in die Produkt-Roadmap einfließen – daten- und business-case-getrieben, statt nach Bauchgefühl
Sales Enablement: Du besitzt das Product Playbook aus kommerzieller Sicht und übersetzt neue Features und Release Notes in klare, verkaufsstarke Value Propositions statt technischer Datenblätter
GTM & Launch-Execution: Gemeinsam mit dem Account Management und Business Development entwickelst du Playbooks sowie Pitch-Materialien und stellst sicher, dass neue Features in bestehenden und neuen Verticals erfolgreich verkauft werden
Teamübergreifende Kollaboration: Als bindendes Glied zwischen Product, Sales, Marketing und Operations strukturierst du das Alignment, treibst Entscheidungen voran und berichtest direkt an den Head of Business Development


Inspire us by


Experience: Du bringst 3–5 Jahre Erfahrung an der Schnittstelle zwischen Product und Commercial mit (z. B. als Product Marketing Manager, Business Analyst im SaaS-Umfeld, Tech-Consultant oder Business Development Manager mit starkem Produktfokus) – idealerweise in einem B2B Scale-up oder Startup
Commercial Mindset: Du denkst in Umsatz und Impact – für dich ist ein Feature erst dann erfolgreich, wenn es sich verkauft. Komplexe Produktwelten übersetzt du mühelos in echten Kundennutzen
Strukturiertes Arbeiten: Du priorisierst konsequent, arbeitest hypothesengetrieben und baust skalierbare Prozesse für die Zukunft auf
Stakeholder Management: Du kommunizierst souverän und auf Augenhöhe mit Product Managern, Sales-Teams und Commercial Leads – dabei kannst du moderieren, eskalieren und Teams alignment-fokussiert zusammenbringen
Sprachkenntnisse: Du hast C2 Deutschkenntnisse und sprichst verhandlungssicheres Englisch, weitere Fremdsprachenkenntnisse sind von Vorteil.


What We Offer


Flexibilität & Eigenverantwortung: Dein Arbeitsalltag, deine Performance - Unser hybrides Modell ermöglicht dir fokussiertes arbeiten im Homeoffice, frische Perspektiven in der Workation sowie persönlichen Austausch an unseren Anchor-Days (Dienstag bis Donnerstag)
Mobilität nach Maß: Volle Fahrt voraus - Ob nachhaltig mit Bike-Leasing oder bequem mit Fahrtkostenzuschuss, wir halten dich mobil und flexibel auf Kurs
Ownership & Gestaltungsspielraum: Dein Impact, deine Bilanz - Übernimm volle Ownership für deinen Bereich und deine KPIs
Teamkultur & Networking: Echte Verbindungen – auch abseits vom Daily Business. Feier Erfolge mit uns bei legendären Teamevents und Spirit Days
Produktive Umgebung: Brainfood Deluxe - Ob Siebträger-Kaffee, Bella&Bona Online-Kantine, frisches Obst oder Müsli Bar. Dein Wohlbefinden ist die Basis für starke Performance
Gesundheit & Ausgleich: Bleib in Balance mit EGYM Wellpass oder Urban Sports Club - deutschlandweit Zugang zu 1.000+ Sport- und Gesundheitseinrichtungen
Dresscode? Dein Code: Bei uns zählt, was du bewegst – nicht, was du trägst. Zieh an, worin du dich am wohlsten fühlst


Innovation through diversity

Unabhängig von deinem Hintergrund, deiner Herkunft, deiner Geschlechtsidentität oder deinen individuellen Voraussetzungen ist es deine Persönlichkeit, die uns interessiert. Deshalb schaffen wir eine Kultur des Miteinanders und des Respekts, in der jedes Teammitglied ein Mitspracherecht hat, sich persönlich weiterentwickeln kann und wertgeschätzt fühlt.

Still here?

Dann könnten wir ein perfektes Match sein!

Bewirb dich am besten über unser Bewerbungsportal - so landet deine Bewerbung direkt bei uns im Team und wir können sie schnell und unkompliziert prüfen.

Falls du Fragen hast, schreibe gerne an Anna-Lena Kramny unter anna-lena.kramny@wemolo.com.

Ready to own (y)our growth?

description_full:
Über uns

Willkommen bei heo. Seit 1996 haben wir, die 250 Mitarbeiter*innen, heo zu einem international führenden Unternehmen in der Welt der Popkultur entwickelt.

Eine tief verwurzelte Leidenschaft prägt seit Anbeginn unser Tun. Es bedeutet uns viel, einen Beitrag zur Popkultur zu leisten. Wenn wir diese Leidenschaft bei den Menschen spüren dürfen, mit denen wir täglich zusammenarbeiten, dann wissen wir, wir sind in unserem Element. Eigene Pfade zu gehen war uns dabei schon immer wichtig. Anders zu sein sehen wir als Chance und Stärke. Das haben wir uns von den vielen Superheldinnen und Superhelden abgeschaut. Denn nur wer bekannte Pfade verlässt, entdeckt neue Möglichkeiten, geheime Schätze und öffnet Horizonte.

Willst du mit uns Schätze entdecken und Horizonte öffnen? Dann gestalte ab sofort mit uns die Zukunft als

HubSpot Administrator (m/w/d) – CRM & Sales Support

Deine Mission und deine Aufgaben:

Als HubSpot Administrator (m/w/d) – CRM & Sales Support unterstützt du die Vertriebsteams in der EMEA-Region durch effiziente Prozesse, transparente Daten und eine wirkungsvolle Nutzung unseres CRM-Systems. Ein zentraler Schwerpunkt deiner Rolle liegt im weiteren Rollout, der Betreuung und der kontinuierlichen Weiterentwicklung unseres HubSpots, um eine effektive und effiziente Vertriebsunterstützung für alle nationalen sowie internationalen Vertriebseinheiten sicherzustellen.


System-Optimierung: Du verantwortest die Anpassung, Verwaltung und Optimierung des HubSpots inkl. Anforderungsmanagement, Priorisierung sowie Workflow- und Prozessanalysen.
User-Support & Training: Du leistest CRM-Support sowie Schulung und Betreuung der internationalen und nationalen Nutzer*innen in den Sales- und Marketingeinheiten.
Kampagnen-Management: Du übernimmst die Anlage und Pflege von Vertriebskampagnen, Reports und Sales Funnels im HubSpot.
Projektbegleitung: Du unterstützt oder leitest eigenständig internationale und nationale Vertriebsprojekte, insbesondere im Bereich Vertriebskampagnen.
Datenanalyse: Du wertest eigenverantwortlich CRM-Daten (Kunden-, Produkt- und Absatzdaten) aus, um Kampagnenideen und Vertriebsinitiativen zu entwickeln.


Das solltest du mitbringen:


Eine kaufmännische Ausbildung oder vergleichbare Qualifikation mit Erfahrung im Vertrieb oder CRM-Umfeld
Expertise in Projekt- und Prozessmanagement sowie sicherer Umgang mit CRM-, Ticket- und Projektmanagement-Tools
Analytisches Denken, Erfahrung mit BI-Tools und aussagekräftiges Reporting
Sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse (C1)
Starke Präsentationsfähigkeiten, Durchsetzungsvermögen und interkulturelle Kompetenz
Strukturierte, lösungsorientierte Arbeitsweise und Fähigkeit, komplexe Themen zu überblicken


Was erwartet dich bei uns?


Wir handeln und kommunizieren respektvoll, wertschätzend und fair und fordern dies auch ein
Ein Unternehmen mit organisch gewachsenen multikulturellen Teams, Begegnung auf Augenhöhe und vielen Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten
Moderne, helle Büros mit optimaler technischer Ausstattung
Gratis Obst, Getränke, Koffein-Nachschub und Gratis-Gym mit geführten Trainingsangeboten auf dem Betriebsgelände
Benefits: Betriebliche Altersvorsorge / Bike-Leasing / Corporate Benefits / Events / Fitness-Angebote / state of the art equipment / Superhelden-Rabatt / Sonderurlaube.


Trete ein in unser Popkultur-heoversum und werde Teil des Teams! explore.heo.com/career

description_full:
Market Development Manager – Export markets




The Market Development Manager, (focus market Germany) will focus on establishing, maintaining and nurturing key business relationships with partners to deliver incremental sales growth in Ficosota Food brands, based in Germany region.

The successful candidate needs to be self-starting and pro-active. He/ she has a key role for planning, executing, optimizing and reporting on all sales and promotional campaigns for the company's portfolio brands, ensuring that set goals or key metrics are achieved to drive in-store presence and sales in a defined territory.




Main duties and responsibilities:

• Manages (directly or indirectly-through third parties/distributors) all trade channels in the geographic area for which responsible

• Analyses sales and trade activities in the business area and initiate business improvement proposals

• Plans sales, profits and investments in the area, prepares promotions and programs.

• Negotiates trade conditions and promotion activities with key clients or distributors operating

• Carries quality and quantity checks on company products supplied in the business area

• Ensures all costs of the operations are adequately and accurately estimated and approved by the higher management

• Leads the preparation of the annual business plan for the area. Responsible for setting the price policy of the company for the area

• Works towards maximizing company results through close collaboration with the regional Brand Manager and the brand managers from the Global Marketing team

• Leads the pricing and budgeting. Responsible for the trade marketing budgets (as set in approved annual plan)

• Responsible for managing the portfolio



Requirements:

• Minimum 5 years of experience in FMCG company in a similar Sales, KA or Trade Marketing position

• Experience in sales planning, sales management and managing budgets

• Written and spoken proficiency in English (C1)

• Previous experience in Central European region is an advantage



Skills and qualifications

• Strong analytical and organizational skills

• Clear verbal and written communication skills

• Negotiation skills

• Driving licence and willingness to travel out of the country (40-60 working days per year)

• Enthusiasm for the company and its growth potential

If you are interested in this opportunity, you feel like a right fit for our international and friendly team, and want to get a hands-on experience in a FMCG company, don`t hesitate to apply!



*We give feedback only to shortlisted candidates and to those invited for next steps in the process.

*All applications will be treated fairly and in strict confidence. Only short-listed candidates will be contacted.

description_full:
Willkommen bei Questax – hier beginnt Deine Sales-Karriere




Du möchtest deine Karriere im Vertrieb starten und suchst ein Umfeld, in dem du wirklich etwas bewegen kannst – auch als Quereinsteiger*in?

Bei Questax bekommst du die Chance, dein Talent zu entfalten, Verantwortung zu übernehmen und Schritt für Schritt zum Pre Sales-Profi zu wachsen. Alles, was du dafür brauchst, bringen wir dir bei – das Wichtigste ist, dass du Lust hast, dich weiterzuentwickeln und richtig durchzustarten.

Als führendes Beratungs- und Dienstleistungsunternehmen mit Standorten in Heidelberg, Frankfurt am Main, Lissabon und Barcelona bringen wir renommierte Unternehmen aus IT und Engineering mit hochqualifizierten freiberuflichen Spezialist*innen zusammen – schnell, kompetent und partnerschaftlich. Vielfalt ist für uns ein Erfolgsfaktor: Unterschiedliche Perspektiven, Persönlichkeiten und Stärken bereichern unser Team. Bei uns zählt dein Potenzial – unabhängig von Herkunft, Geschlecht oder Identität.




Aufgaben:

Du baust aktiv neue Geschäftsbeziehungen auf – am Telefon und im direkten Austausch. Keine Sorge: Alles, was du dafür brauchst, lernst du bei uns Schritt für Schritt.
Du entwickelst aus ersten Kontakten langfristige Partnerschaften und bist für Deine Kund*innen zentrale Ansprechperson.

Du hast ein Studium oder eine Ausbildung (idealerweise kaufmännisch) und den Drive, im Sales durchzustarten
Du arbeitest gern im Team, packst mit an und übernimmst Verantwortung, wenn’s drauf ankommt
Du bist motiviert, schnell zu lernen und deine Karriere aktiv mitzugestalten
Du kommunizierst gern, bist offen und hast keine Scheu vor dem Telefon




Unsere Benefits:

Unbefristeter Arbeitsvertrag
Strukturierte Einarbeitung in der Questax Sales Academy
Klar definierte Karrierepfade, Mentoring & individuelle Weiterentwicklung
30 Urlaubstage + Möglichkeit, zeitweise aus dem Ausland zu arbeiten

300–900 € Gesundheitszuschuss pro Jahr
Ein flexibles Hybridmodell, das Autonomie und Teamkultur optimal vereint
Fixgehalt plus starke Provisionschancen – deine Performance bestimmt dein Einkommen
Sobald du einen bestimmten Umsatz erreichst, hast du die Option auf einen Firmenwagen inkl. Tankkarte – natürlich auch zur privaten Nutzung.
Mobilitätsvorteile: Jobticket oder kostenlose Parkplätze
Incentives, Team-Events & Workations in Lissabon oder Barcelona
Questax Arena: Netflix- & PlayStation-Lounge zur Entspannung
Und ja – der berühmte Obstkorb darf natürlich auch nicht fehlen :)




Bei uns kannst du dich persönlich und fachlich weiterentwickeln, Erfolge erleben und deinen eigenen Karriereweg gestalten. Wir setzen auf langfristige Zusammenarbeit, weil wir gemeinsam etwas bewegen wollen.

description_full:
Key Account Manager & Field Manager (m/f/d) – Northern Germany

Ø Northern Germany | Home Office

Ø  Territory: Northwest & Northeast Germany, parts of NRW & Berlin

Ø  Ideally based in Hamburg, Hanover, or Bremen

Ø Start Date: October 1, 2026




Join a Premium International Brand Portfolio

At DK Household Brands, we bring innovation, quality, and style into homes around the world. As part of the internationally renowned Diethelm Keller Group, we proudly represent premium household and kitchen brands including AdHoc, Cole & Mason, and Zyliss.

To support our continued growth in Germany, we are looking for a commercially driven and entrepreneurial Key Account Manager & Field Manager (m/f/d) to strengthen our presence across Northern Germany.

This is an exciting opportunity for a sales professional who thrives on building strong customer relationships, driving growth, and leading market development in a dynamic consumer goods environment.




Your Mission

In this multifaceted role, you will take ownership of key customer relationships while actively expanding our market presence and supporting freelance field sales representatives across your territory.




Your Responsibilities

Develop, manage, and grow existing key accounts and retail partnerships
Identify and acquire new customers and sales channels
Drive sustainable sales growth for our premium brand portfolio
Implement product launches, promotions, and in-store initiatives
Support, coach, and coordinate freelance sales representatives
Strengthen brand visibility and positioning within the market
Monitor market trends, competitors, and customer developments
Represent the company at trade fairs, customer events, and international meetings
Collaborate closely with internal teams and report directly to the Sales Director Germany/Austria




What You Bring

You are a motivated sales personality with strong relationship-building and negotiation skills who enjoys working independently while contributing to a collaborative team culture.




Ideally, you have:

Experience in Key Account Management and/or field sales
A proven track record in driving sales growth and customer development
Strong communication, negotiation, and closing skills
A proactive, hands-on, and solution-oriented mindset
Structured and independent working methods
Experience within consumer goods, homewares, furniture retail, department stores, specialist retail, or grocery retail is highly desirable
Good Microsoft Office skills
German speaker, with good English communication skills are an advantage
Willingness to travel extensively within your territory




What We Offer

Attractive fixed salary
Performance-based bonus scheme
Company car with private use option
Corporate credit card for fuel and business expenses
Modern home office equipment
iPhone, iPad, and laptop
30 days annual leave
Flexible working hours based on trust
High level of autonomy and responsibility
International working environment with development opportunities



Interested?

description_full:
Technical Proposal Manager (m/w/d) Navy

Seit mehr als 140 Jahren sind wir ein innovatives Maschinenbauunternehmen für namhafte Kunden auf der ganzen Welt. Unser Fokus liegt heute auf der Entwicklung, Fertigung und dem Vertrieb von Mittel- und Hochdruckkompressoren für zahlreiche Anwendungen in den Segmenten Industry, Commercial Shipping, Defense und Offshore.




Im Zuge einer Nachfolgeregelung suchen wir einen Technical Proposal Manager (m/w/d) Navy für das Team Business Development & Sales – Navy & Offshore innerhalb der Vertriebsabteilung.




Tätigkeitsbeschreibung

Als Technical Proposal Manager (m/w/d) im Team Navy & Offshore, welches aktuell sieben Personen umfasst, verantworten Sie die Erstellung von technischen sowie kommerziellen Angeboten für unsere Mittel- und Hochdruckkompressoren und -anlagen im Navy-Bereich. Sie begleiten unsere Kunden im In- und Ausland von der ersten Anfrage bis zum Vertragsabschluss im Hinblick auf die Kompressoren-Technik und das entsprechende Zubehör - insbesondere für Neubauprojekte im Bereich Navy. Nach Auftragseingang bereiten Sie die Aufträge für die Übergabe an die nachfolgenden Abteilungen sowie die Produktion vor und arbeiten dabei eng mit dem Business Development Management sowie den Anwendungsspezialisten aus dem Sales Application Engineering zusammen.




Ihre Aufgaben

Erstellung von Standard-Angeboten für Kompressoren im Navy-Segment
Erstellung sowie Ausarbeitung von technisch anspruchsvollen Angeboten für Druckluftsysteme auf Navy-Schiffen (Fregatten, Korvetten, etc.) und U-Booten
Beratung unserer Kunden während der gesamten Angebotsphase
Auslegung von Kompressoren und Auswahl von Druckluftkomponenten in Zusammenarbeit mit dem Sales Application Engineering
Zusammenarbeit mit dem Business Development Management bei der Kundenbetreuung
Geführte Angebotsnachverfolgung mit Hilfe des CRM-Systems
Gelegentlicher Besuch von Fachmessen oder Kunden
Mitarbeit bei der stetigen Prozessoptimierung



Ihr Profil

Technisches Hochschulstudium, abgeschlossene technische Berufsausbildung mit einer Weiterbildung oder vergleichbare Ausbildung mit Berufserfahrung
Freude am Vertrieb von erklärungsbedürftigen Investitionsgütern und gutes technisches Verständnis
Strukturierte und eigenverantwortliche Arbeitsweise
Hohe Motivation, das eigene Wissen in einer sich stetig weiterentwickelnden Branche zu erweitern
Interkulturelle Kompetenz
Gute Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift, weitere Sprachen von Vorteil
Sichere Anwendung von MS Office-Anwendungen und CRM-Systemen, idealerweise Salesforce
Bereitschaft zu gelegentlichen Dienstreisen



Unser Angebot

Arbeitsplatz in einem inhabergeführten Familienunternehmen in der dritten Generation, das Teil einer gesunden mittelständischen Unternehmensgruppe (weltweit rund 1.200 Mitarbeiter) mit stetigem Wachstum ist
Gute Work-Life-Balance: nur 35,5 Wochenstunden in Vollzeit
Betriebliche Altersvorsorge von 90 € monatlich
Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten
Zuschuss zum Job- bzw. Deutschlandticket sowie kostenlose Parkplätze
Angebot von Firmensport über Hansefit
30 Tage Jahresurlaub, 6 tarifliche Freistellungstage sowie Sonderurlaub gem. Tarifvertrag
Urlaubs- und Weihnachtsgeld
Flexible und familienfreundliche Arbeitszeitgestaltung möglich (bis zu 60 % mobiles Arbeiten, Gleitzeitkonto)



Ihre Arbeitszeit: Teil-/Vollzeit
Ihr Einstellungstermin: zum nächstmöglichen Zeitpunkt

Execute channel development, maintenance, and optimization aligned with corpor
description_full:
Summary

Develop, maintain, and optimize channels aligned with corporate strategy and market needs. Identify potential partners, create expansion plans, execute investment tasks, coordinate resources, and refine channel strategies. Expand and upgrade the channel network, boost sales performance and efficiency, increase market coverage, and achieve business goals.

Key Responsibilities


Channel development and cooperation: Identify and cultivate potential channel partners including distributors, chain retailers, and platform service providers.
Conduct business negotiations to establish new partnerships, renew existing agreements, and enter new markets, expanding channel network coverage to drive business growth.
Execute channel development, maintenance, and optimization aligned with corporate strategy by prospecting partners, creating expansion plans, completing recruitment targets, coordinating resources, and refining channel strategies to enhance network quality, boost sales performance, improve operational efficiency, increase market penetration, and support overall business objectives.
Sales target management: Develop annual/quarterly/monthly channel sales plans with assigned targets. Analyse market trends and competitive landscape to propose sales strategies, align supply chain resources, and ensure achievement of channel sales and profitability goals to elevate overall channel performance.
Channel operation optimization: Support partners in market expansion and customer service with business guidance and resources.
Execute promotional campaigns to strengthen product competitiveness.
Conduct regular channel performance analysis to streamline processes and enhance operational efficiency and service standards.
Team building and collaboration: Establish and develop sales teams through recruitment, training, and performance management. Develop standardized operating procedures and manuals to institutionalize best practices. Facilitate cross-departmental collaboration to secure necessary support for channel operations and sustainable business growth.
Market research and innovation: Perform market analysis on industry trends, competitors, and customer needs. Explore innovative channel models and partnership approaches. Optimize channel architecture and collaboration strategies to strengthen market competitiveness and brand influence.


Qualifications


Experience in account management and sales
Experience working cross borders and building long-term B2B partnerships
Strong understanding of EU retail
Comfortable analysing complex data and providing actionable recommendations.
Structured, performance-oriented, and able to collaborate effectively with diverse stakeholders, including international teams.
Fluent in English, both written and spoken. Other EU languages a huge plus


【About JD.com】

JD.com (NASDAQ: JD and HKEX: 9618), also known as JINGDONG, is a leading supply chain-based technology and service provider. The company’s cutting-edge retail infrastructure seeks to enable consumers to buy whatever they want, whenever and wherever they want it. The company has opened its technology and infrastructure to partners, brands and other sectors, as part of its "Retail as a Service" offering to help drive productivity and innovation across a range of industries. JD.com’s business has expanded across retail, technology, logistics, health, industrials, property development and international business. JD.com is ranked 44th on the Fortune Global 500 list and is China’s largest retailer by revenue, serving over 600 million annual active customers. The company has been listed on NASDAQ since 2014, and on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange since 2020. Committed to the principles of customer first, innovation, dedication, ownership, gratitude, and integrity, the company's mission is to make lives better through technology, striving to be the most trusted company in the world.

【Our Global Business】

We are dedicated to building a digitally intelligent, cross-border supply chain and global retail infrastructure. Leveraging our global supply chain capabilities, JD.com continues to expand in markets where our competitive strengths shine. Currently, JD.com's operations span China, the U.K., the Netherlands, France, Germany, Spain, Brazil, Hungary, Japan, South Korea, Australia, Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, Indonesia, Saudi Arabia, the UAE, the U.S., and many others, serving customers worldwide.

Key International Business Segments: Joybuy (online retail business in Europe), International Logistics, Cross-border Import Business, JD Industrials International, JD Property International

【"Joybuy" - Online Retail Business in Europe】

Joybuy is JD.com's online retail business in Europe. It is currently in the test phase in the UK, the Netherlands, Germany, France, Belgium, and Luxembourg. Joybuy places the customer at the heart of everything it does. Our slogan, “Don’t just buy, Joybuy,” perfectly captures our mission to fulfill our customers’ needs and provide a service that is easy and convenient, but also enjoyable and fun.

We offer you numerous opportunities to help shape the mobility of tomorrow in a dynamic and agile environment. Our approximately 2,700 employees throughout Europe are united by a common passion: to give their best every day for our customers in more than 50 countries. True to our claim: You drive, we care. Become part of our diverse, dedicated and unique team!

What you can expect


You act as the central link between sales processes & performance measurement, sales data, and technical requirements.
You work within our Sales Data Hub, optimising sales processes, performance tracking, and commercial decision-making
You take on a leading role in developing and maintaining PowerBI Dashboards covering sales KPIs, pipeline health, forecasting, and campaign performance.
You define and continuously improve sales KPIs and performance metrics, ensuring relevance, clarity, and adoption by sales teams.
You enable sales teams by training and supporting them on dashboards, KPIs, and analytical tools, driving adoption and impact.
You enalyse funnel performance and pipeline data to identify bottlenecks, risks, and growth opportunities.
You support the execution of > What makes you stand out
You hold a degree in Business Informatics, Data Science, Computer Science, Industrial Engineering, Business Administration, or a comparable field.
You bring experience in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, Sales Analytics, or a similar commercial analytics role.
You have a strong understanding of sales processes, pipeline management, forecasting, and revenue metrics, and you can translate them into technical requirements for engineers.
You hold a degree in Business Informatics, Data Science, Computer Science, Industrial Engineering, Business Administration, or a comparable field.
You are a great stakeholder manager who can talk to sales and engineering alike.
You are highly proficient in Power BI and experienced in building dashboards that drive action.
You are comfortable working with CRM data and sales systems (e.g. Salesforce, HubSpot, Dynamics, or similar).
You have a strong analytical mindset and enjoy turning complex data into clear stories and recommendations.
You think beyond reporting and proactively identify opportunities to improve sales performance and efficiency.
You are execution-oriented and enjoy working closely with sales teams to turn insights into results.
You communicate effectively and are able to bridge different target groups (business & tech).
You have excellent German and English skills, both written and spoken.


We are looking forward to your application and to applicants who enrich our diverse culture! Regardless of age, gender, origin and sexual identity and orientation. Severely disabled applicants will be given preference if equally qualified. This position can be full-time or part-time (min. 30h/week). DKV Mobility is looking for the best talents and knows that these are not always available on a full-time basis. Many of our employees work part-time or in flexible working models. Please talk to us about the flexibility you need during the application process.

Why DKV Mobility? Here are five good reasons...

At DKV Mobility, we are team players - because we are only successful together! #teamofteams

You should feel welcome with us from the very beginning!

We've Been Growing For About 90 Years

How we do it? We keep adapting our products and business model to meet changing customer needs. That's how we stay mobile and master every challenge the future holds.

There are also many other good reasons to work at DKV Mobility. For example, we offer you comprehensive company health management, parent-child offices (from 2023) and support you in leasing your eBike through our partner Jobrad!

We attach great importance to work-life balance.

We stand for the compatibility of family and career! That's why we offer flexible working hours and family-friendly working time models. In addition, we rely on a balanced mix of on-site meetings and home office.

We support you in your development

We offer you optimal conditions to familiarize yourself so that you can quickly find your way around and become a part of the team! To further your personal development, we offer you access to a modern learning environment - independent of time and location. This way you can also face the challenges of tomorrow!

We are committed to a net-zero future

After reaching our Green Pledge climate target in 2023 by reducing carbon emissions in our own business operations by 50.4% compared to the base year 2019, we set ourselves ambitious net-zero climate targets. The targets have been validated by the Science Based Targets initiative. By 2050, DKV Mobility commits to reach net-zero greenhouse gas emissions across the value chain from a 2022 base year. You want to take climate action? Follow us on our road to net-zero.

We are a certified employer

Our employees trust us. As an employer, we regularly receive awards from independent institutes, e.g. as Top Employer Germany and as Great Place to Work!

Have we made you curious? Then we are looking forward to your application! If you still have open questions then please contact Nicolas Magel via nicolas.magel@dkv-mobility.com.

description_full:
This role acts as the bridge between business requirements, data governance, and technical implementation, ensuring that data pipelines, models, and mappings are accurate, validated, and ready for business use.




Responsibilities:

Collaborate with source system owners and regulatory stakeholders to gather and refine data pipeline requirements
Translate data pipeline requirements into epics and stories ready for refinement in Jira
Lead backlog refinement sessions with data architects, domain leads, and scientists to prioritize data ingestion and transformation activities
Define story structure to comprise the requirements of the work to be done and the definition of done and the different types of tasks relevant for the domain to accomplish with their associated roles, documented in a Confluence page
Endorse the role of agile scrum master for the RDH team: coach team members in self-management, organize high-value increments in sprints meeting the definition of done
Identify and document potential data issues, including quality, normalization, duplication, completeness, or governance gaps, and share findings with the data domain and platform lead
Work closely with data architects to define and document the data transformation pipeline architecture
Support the data architect in defining and maintaining the data models used across regulatory use cases by reviewing proposed changes and evaluating their relevance towards new requirements
Support the review phase led by the Data Domain Lead, verifying that the regulatory and business context is preserved across transformed datasets
Validate that all data mappings and transformations meet regulatory compliance, data quality, and analytical readiness standards
Collaborate with data scientists to define mapping logic for regulatory entities such as substances, studies, and documents
Review the design of quality control pipelines, ensuring mapping accuracy and alignment with analytical expectations




What we expect:

Bachelor’s degree in data analytics, computer science
5+ years of experience in data or business analysis, e.g., life sciences, agrochemical, or pharma domain
Demonstrated expertise in data transformation pipelines, and data quality frameworks
Hands-on experience with Databricks
Familiarity with metadata management and data governance principles
Strong analytical skills, with the ability to translate business requirements into technical deliverables
Excellent communication and documentation skills, with experience collaborating across disciplines e.g. Data Scientists, Architects, Domain Leads, Platform Leads
A collaborative and proactive approach, comfortable working in iterative, agile environments
High attention to detail with strong problem-solving capabilities
Self-motivated and adaptable, able to navigate ambiguity and evolving project priorities in a complex data environment
Upper-intermediate English or higher




We offer:

Competitive compensation
Remote or office work
Flexible working hours
Healthcare benefits: medical insurance and paid sick leave
Continuous education, mentoring, and professional development programs
A team with excellent tech expertise
Certifications paid by the company

description_full:
Who We Are?




ITC Infotech is a leading global technology services and solutions provider, led by Business and Technology Consulting. ITC Infotech provides business-friendly solutions to help clients succeed and be future-ready, by seamlessly bringing together digital expertise, strong industry specific alliances and the unique ability to leverage deep domain expertise from ITC Group businesses. The company provides technology solutions and services to enterprises across industries such as Banking & Financial Services, Healthcare, Manufacturing, Consumer Goods, Travel and Hospitality, through a combination of traditional and newer business models, as a long-term sustainable partner.




What we are looking for?




We are seeking an experienced Data Analyst to support the Business Process Architecture team by analyzing manufacturing data, supporting data modeling initiatives, and enabling accurate mapping of data across domains. The role requires strong analytical, technical, and stakeholder management skills.




Salary: Euros 60K-65K/Annum Gross + Bonus

Working Mode: Onsite for 3days/week




Key Responsibilities




Analyze and interpret manufacturing Mfg. data and understand its business applications and source systems.
Work closely with business stakeholders to gather insights and translate them into data requirements.
Support Data Modelers and Data Architects in identifying correct data sources and mapping them to enterprise data domains and models.
Perform complex data analysis using SQL to support reporting, insights, and architecture decisions.
Ensure data consistency, quality, and alignment with business process architecture standards.




Required Skills & Qualifications




8-12 years of experience in Data Analysis roles.
Strong understanding of manufacturing data and related business processes.
Excellent SQL skills for data extraction and analysis.
Solid understanding of data modelling concepts and experience working with data models.
Strong communication and stakeholder management capabilities.




Our X-Factor




Work ethic: You are a consummate professional.
Aptitude: You have an innate capacity to transition from project to project without skipping a beat.
Communication: You have excellent written and verbal communication skills for coordination across projects and teams.
Impact: You are a critical thinker with an emphasis on creativity and innovation.

description_full:
Are you a Performance Marketer who drives growth? If you’re experienced managing paid campaigns, analyzing data, and turning insights into action, we’d love to hear from you.




This Place is a Berlin-based skincare brand redefining what selfcare can look like. Our functional formulations support skin health, sleep, period pain, and recovery—crafted in Germany with clean, vegan, and 100% natural ingredients.




Role Description

We’re looking for a Performance Marketing Manager to scale This Place’s performance engine across channels. This role drives efficient customer acquisition across prospecting, conversion, and retargeting.. You will work closely with the CMO to ensure strong alignment between acquisition and long-term customer value.

This is a hands-on role with real ownership, ideal for someone who enjoys both execution and strategic thinking.




What You'll Do

• Own and scale our customer acquisition through paid channels (Meta, Google)

• Drive retention and customer value through CRM and organic social

• Manage day-to-day campaign execution, including optimization, budget allocation, pacing, and bidding strategies across channels and markets

• Drive efficient customer acquisition, improving CAC and ROAS across channels

• Run structured testing across creatives, audiences, and formats

• Translate performance insights into clear creative direction and iteration priorities

• Strengthen tracking, attribution, and reporting to improve decision-making

• Connect performance across channels and ensure marketing delivers measurable business impact







Qualifications

• 3–5 years of hands-on experience in performance marketing, ideally in D2C e-commerce

• Proven track record managing and scaling paid campaigns across Meta and Google

• Strong understanding of CAC, ROAS, and performance optimization levers

• Experience with CRM/lifecycle marketing (e.g. Klaviyo or similar platforms)

• Analytical mindset with experience in testing, attribution, and performance reporting

• Solid working knowledge of Shopify

• Comfortable working hands-on while also thinking strategically

• Fluent in German and English

Das bieten wir dir


Spannendes und perfektes Timing, in unserer Hyper-growth-Phase, Verantwortung zu übernehmen und Erfolge zu erzielen
Viel Gestaltungsspielraum in einem Familienunternehmen

Snacks und Getränke jeglicher Art
Direkten Impact auf einen unserer wichtigsten Umsatzkanäle
Attraktives Gehalt





Über uns



Wir sind Clouvou - ein schnell wachsendes D2C E-Commerce Scale-up im Bereich ergonomische Workspace-Produkte mit einem klaren Ziel: Menschen im Home Office und in der Gaming-Community mit Komfort, Design und Qualität zu begeistern!
Mit einem achtstelligen Umsatz und einem wachsenden Team befinden wir uns in einer starken Skalierungsphase.


Gegründet 2022 von Joe-Robert Sherbourne aus eigener Erfahrung mit chronischen Rückenproblemen, verfolgt CLOUVOU das Ziel, Komfort, Design und Funktionalität neu zu definieren. Seit 2024 ist auch sein Bruder Jack Sherbourne Teil der Geschäftsführung.

Durch Direktvertrieb über Amazon, unseren eigenen Webshop und weitere Plattformen bieten wir hochwertiges Workspace-Equipment mit Fokus auf Langlebigkeit und modernem Design – zu fairen Preisen. Von ergonomischen Stühlen über höhenverstellbare Schreibtische bis hin zu weiteren Lösungen für gesundes Arbeiten und komfortables Gaming.

Schließe dich CLOUVOU an und gestalte die Zukunft des Online-Handels mit uns!

Wir freuen uns auf deine Bewerbung mit einer kurzen Info zu deinem möglichen Startdatum und zu deiner Gehaltsvorstellung.



Weitere Informationen unter: https://clouvou.com/pages/uber-uns


Unser Office befindet sich in Lawaetzstraße 10, 22844 Norderstedt

description_full:
Wer wir sind

Die KundK GmbH unterstützt mittelständische Industrieunternehmen dabei, digital neue Kunden zu gewinnen und ihre Auftragsbücher planbar zu füllen. 🚀




Als spezialisierte Agentur für digitales Marketing entwickeln wir maßgeschneiderte Systeme, mit denen Unternehmen ihre Wunschkunden gezielt ansprechen, ihre Sichtbarkeit erhöhen und planbar neue B2B-Anfragen generieren können. Gerade im industriellen Umfeld werden digitale Kanäle immer wichtiger, um zur richtigen Zeit bei den richtigen Entscheidern sichtbar zu sein.




Wir verbinden Strategie, Umsetzung und klare Prozesse, um nachhaltige Ergebnisse für den digitalen Vertrieb zu schaffen und Industrieunternehmen effizienter zu Wachstum zu verhelfen. 💡




Für unser Team in München suchen wir zur Verstärkung ab sofort einen Digital Marketing Manager / Online-Marketing Manager (m/w/d), der operative Verantwortung für reale Kundenprojekte übernimmt und Lust hat, gemeinsam mit uns zu wachsen.




Deine Aufgabenbereiche (nach intensiver Einarbeitung)

In dieser Position betreust du eigenständig die digitalen Kanäle und Online-Marketing-Maßnahmen unserer Kunden aus dem industriellen Mittelstand:




Social Media Management: Ganzheitliche, strategische und operative Betreuung der Kundenkanäle (Postings, Content-Planung und Kampagnen).




Copywriting: Konzeption und Verfassen von verkaufsstarken Werbetexten zur optimalen Vermarktung der jeweiligen Kundenleistungen.




Webdesign: Konzeption, Design und optische Gestaltung von modernen, konvertierenden Landingpages und Websites.




Online-Marketing-Kampagnen: Erstellung, Steuerung und kontinuierliche Betreuung von Werbeanzeigen über die gängigen Plattformen (Google Ads, Meta Business Manager, LinkedIn Campaign Manager).




SEO-Maßnahmen: Nachhaltige Implementierung von zielführenden SEO-Maßnahmen bei den verschiedenen Kundenprojekten zur Steigerung der organischen Reichweite.




Reporting & Optimierung: Erstellung von datenbasierten Auswertungen und Berichten sowie die Durchführung proaktiver Optimierungen zur Sicherung des Kampagnenerfolgs.




Deine Qualifikationen – Das bringst du mit:

Abgeschlossenes Studium oder eine erfolgreich beendete Berufsausbildung (idealerweise in den Bereichen Marketing, Medien, Kommunikation oder einem verwandten Feld).




Erste fundierte praktische Erfahrung im Bereich Online-Marketing (z. B. gesammelt in einer Agentur, durch relevante Praktika oder erste Berufserfahrung).




Gute Vorkenntnisse in den operativen Disziplinen wie Social Media, Webdesign, Online-Ads oder SEO.




Eine schnelle Auffassungsgabe, analytisch-methodisches Denken und ein hohes Maß an Disziplin.




Zuverlässigkeit, Präzision und die Fähigkeit, bestehenden, erprobten Prozessen exakt zu folgen.




Eine absolut saubere, stilsichere und fehlerfreie schriftliche Ausdrucksform in der deutschen Sprache.




Starke kommunikative Fähigkeiten, Teamgeist und ein sicheres, professionelles Auftreten im direkten Austausch mit Kunden.




Große Motivation, dich schnell in neue Themen einzuarbeiten, und echte Lust auf ein dynamisches, ambitioniertes Agenturumfeld.




Was wir dir bieten

Attraktive Vergütung
30 Tage Urlaub
Homeoffice-Möglichkeit
Kurze Probezeit
Firmenwagen: Option inklusive Privatnutzung (nach 12 Monaten)
Modernes-Büro in zentralster Lage in München (kein Großraumbüro)
Premium-Ausstattung: MacBook, höhenverstellbarer Schreibtisch & Co.
Firmenfitness: EGYM Wellpass




Bereit für deinen nächsten Schritt?

Jetzt bewerben!

description_full:
Über die DGQ


Die Deutsche Gesellschaft für Qualität (DGQ) unterstützt Unternehmen dabei, mit hochwertigen Produkten und Dienstleistungen erfolgreich am Markt zu bestehen. Als zentrale, deutsche Qualitätsgesellschaft ist die DGQ erster Ansprechpartner für Qualität, Qualitätsmanagement und Qualitätssicherung.




Die DGQ-Personenzertifizierungsstelle ist mit einem Team von neun Mitarbeitenden eine unabhängige Stelle innerhalb der DGQ e. V. Mit rund 80 Prüfer:innen / Prüfaufsichten bieten wir Zertifizierungen / Prüfungen zur Qualifikation und Kompetenzbescheinigung an. Mit rund 7.000 Zertifikaten pro Jahr gehören wir zu den führenden Anbietern akkreditierter Personenzertifizierungen.




Sie planen Ihre berufliche Zukunft in der Bildungsbranche?
Sie freuen sich darauf, sich in das Team Produktmanagement einzubringen, rasch Produktverantwortung zu übernehmen und selbst zu gestalten? Sie möchten für eine anerkannte Marke in der Bildungsbranche arbeiten und ein abwechslungsreiches Aufgabengebiet übernehmen? Dann sind Sie hier richtig!




Für unseren Standort Frankfurt/M. suchen wir zum nächstmöglichen Zeitpunkt unbefristet in Vollzeit (40 Stunden / Woche) einen




Produktmanager (w/m/d) Personenzertifizierung


Ihre Aufgaben:

Sie verantworten die Entwicklung und Steuerung von Zertifizierungsprogrammen entlang des gesamten Produktlebenszyklus und sorgen gemeinsam mit Vertrieb und Marketing für eine starke Marktpositionierung.




Entwicklung, Pflege und Weiterentwicklung von Zertifizierungsprogrammen gemäß ISO/IEC 17024

Markt- und Wettbewerbsanalysen zur Identifikation neuer Zertifizierungsbedarfe

Steuerung des gesamten Produktlebenszyklus (Konzeption, Einführung, Weiterentwicklung, ggf. Einstellung)

Zusammenarbeit mit Fachexperten, Gremien und Stakeholdern (intern und extern)

Erstellung und Pflege von Bestimmungen, Regelwerken und Ordnungen

Unterstützung bei Akkreditierungs- und Überwachungsaudits

Abstimmung mit Vertrieb und Marketing zur erfolgreichen Positionierung der Zertifizierungen





An zwei Tagen pro Woche können Sie nach der Einarbeitungsphase mobil arbeiten.


Ihr Profil:


Sie verfügen über einen kaufmännischen, technischen oder sozialwissenschaftlichen (Fach-) Hochschulabschluss oder einen kaufmännischen oder technischen Berufsabschluss. Sie haben mindestens drei Jahre Berufserfahrung in mindestens einem dieser Bereiche: Managementsysteme, Erwachsenenbildung oder Produktmanagement.




Sie arbeiten gerne eigenverantwortlich und schätzen zugleich den Austausch im Team. Flexibilität, Verantwortungsbewusstsein und ein souveränes Auftreten zeichnen Sie ebenso aus wie Verhandlungsgeschick und Durchsetzungsstärke im Umgang mit externen Partnern. Auch in anspruchsvollen Situationen überzeugen Sie durch Ihre Kommunikationsstärke und Ihr sicheres Auftreten vor Gruppen.




Analytisches Denkvermögen, hohes Abstraktionsvermögen, eine strukturierte Arbeitsweise sowie ein klarer Fokus auf Lösungen runden Ihr Profil ab.




Sie verfügen über ausgezeichnete Deutschkenntnisse sowie sehr gute Kenntnisse in Präsentationstechniken und den MS-Office-Anwendungen. Gute Englischkenntnisse sind von Vorteil.


Was bieten wir?
Geregelte Arbeitszeiten mit Gleitzeit, der Möglichkeit, mobil zu arbeiten und 30 Tage Urlaub für die perfekte Work-Life-Balance
Intensive Einarbeitung: Damit Sie von Anfang an optimal durchstarten können
Zusätzliche Benefits: Arbeitgeberzuschüsse zur Betriebskantine, zur betrieblichen Altersvorsorge und zum Deutschlandticket sowie weitere attraktive Gesundheits- und Sozialleistungen
Wertschätzung und Teamspirit: Wir fördern eine Unternehmenskultur, die auf Vertrauen, Respekt und Zusammenarbeit basiert
Weiterentwicklung: Bei uns können Sie sich kontinuierlich weiterentwickeln – wir bieten die Möglichkeit, neue Fähigkeiten zu erlernen und sich in Ihrem Bereich weiterzubilden

Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Bewerbung!

Senden Sie uns Ihre aussagekräftige Online-Bewerbung über unser Karriereportal – bitte mit Ihrem Wunschgehalt. Wann können Sie bei uns durchstarten?




Haben Sie Fragen zur Stelle oder möchten Sie mehr über Ihre Möglichkeiten bei uns erfahren? Wir stehen Ihnen gerne zur Verfügung und beraten Sie ausführlich.




Für Rückfragen erreichen Sie uns unter (nur für Bewerber:innen)
Telefon: 069 95424-115
Mail: recruiting@dgq.de
WhatsApp: +49 151 2222 9923




Über die DGQ
Die Deutsche Gesellschaft für Qualität (DGQ) unterstützt Unternehmen dabei, mit hochwertigen Produkten und Dienstleistungen erfolgreich am Markt zu bestehen. Das einzigartige Netzwerk der DGQ vereint über 6.000 Qualitätsexpert:innen in mehr als 4.000 Unternehmen aller Größen und Branchen. Berufseinsteiger:innen, Fachexpert:innen und Manager:innen nutzen den direkten Erfahrungsaustausch in deutschlandweit über 60 Regional- und Fachkreisen.




Das DGQ-Netzwerk bietet die vielseitigste und umfassendste Plattform zum Austausch von Wissen, Praxiserfahrungen und Trends rund um qualitätsrelevante Themen. Die DGQ engagiert sich in nationalen und internationalen Initiativen, Partnerschaften, Gremien zur Gestaltung zentraler Normen sowie Innovations- und Forschungsprojekten.




Mit rund 200 Trainer:innen und über 1.300 praxisbezogenen Trainings stellt die DGQ ein breites Weiterbildungsangebot zur Verfügung und erteilt im Markt anerkannte Personenzertifikate. Auf Basis ihres umfassenden Engagements für Qualität gestaltet die DGQ wissensbasierte Leistungen und Lösungen für Gegenwart und Zukunft.




Deutsche Gesellschaft für Qualität e.V. (DGQ)
August-Schanz-Straße 21A | 60433 Frankfurt | Deutschland
http://www.dgq.de

description_full:
Vacancy: Product Manager




About Us

Prime Insights is a Sweden-based technology company reaching millions of users through our proprietary Market Research Panel. Our platform connects real, high-quality users with market research surveys from global brands. This allows our clients to gather meaningful insights through reliable online research, while our members enjoy a simple and rewarding experience.




Your Role

As a Product Manager at Prime Insights, you’ll be at the center of building and scaling products that make an impact. The exact area of responsibility is still to be defined, it could involve B2B products or our B2C apps, so we’re looking for a generalist who thrives on adaptability.

Most importantly, we’re seeking someone with a big ownership mindset: a person ready to take initiative, drive ideas forward, and make strategic decisions that align user needs with business goals. You’ll work across the full product lifecycle, collaborating with developers, designers, and stakeholders to deliver meaningful results.




Your Skills

3+ years of experience in product management, with a track record of successful launches.
Strong ability to adapt quickly and take ownership in uncertain or evolving product areas.
Solid understanding of the product lifecycle, from ideation to launch and iteration.
Experience with large-scale apps, ideally in rewards/loyalty, gaming, or similar industries.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills across teams and stakeholders.
Strong organizational and prioritization abilities, with proven project management experience.
Analytical, data-driven mindset to guide decisions and prioritize effectively.




Nice to Have

Technical understanding (e.g., backend systems) to collaborate smoothly with engineering teams.
Experience with product management tools like JIRA, Asana, or Trello.
Knowledge of UX/UI principles to help deliver exceptional user experiences.
Familiarity with product development cycles and time-to-market optimization.
Ability to balance multiple products or features while maintaining quality outcomes.




Our Offer:

Competitive salary commensurate with your experience and expertise;
Regular salary reviews to ensure your compensation reflects your contributions;
Collaborate with an international team on diverse and engaging projects;
Enjoy a safe and stable work environment with ample opportunities for growth and development.




❗Important: We are not considering freelancers working on multiple projects simultaneously. This is a full-time position for a dedicated Product Manager who is ready to commit to a single product ecosystem and contribute meaningfully to its long-term success.

description_full:
Your job at DKV Mobility? As part of a leading European B2B platform for on-the-road payment solutions, you will work in an exciting environment. Our tasks are defined by our Purpose: To drive the transition towards an efficient and sustainable future of mobility. We offer you numerous opportunities to help shape the mobility of tomorrow in a dynamic and agile environment. Our approximately 2,700 employees throughout Europe are united by a common passion: to give their best every day for our customers in more than 50 countries. True to our claim: You drive, we care. Become part of our diverse, dedicated and unique team!

What you can expect

Do you want to play an active role in driving a company’s growth and turning big plans into reality? Then join our team! You can look forward to exciting challenges, an inspiring environment, and a work culture that combines flexibility and collaboration – with our 60/40 hybrid model and modern offices in Ratingen as a hub for ideas.

As part of our team, you will take on the following responsibilities:


You develop and own the product strategy for digital eMobility services @home & @work, ensuring that existing and new markets are assessed in a data‑ and AI‑driven way with regard to competition, product fit, and scalability.
In doing so, you build AI‑based competitive and data analytics capabilities across the team (methods, tools, standards) and support the continuous evolution of the products, including strategic guardrails such as the integration of external hardware as a service enabler.
You continuously scan existing and new markets using AI (competitors, products, pricing logic, regulatory frameworks) to enable faster, well‑founded decisions, identify market entry barriers early, and significantly reduce time‑to‑market for new countries and product variants.
You evaluate market opportunities and product fit (value proposition, differentiation, feasibility, risks) based on quantitative and qualitative analyses.
You define and further develop the Digital Services Strategy for @home / @work (e.g. user, billing, and transparency services) and translate it into clear strategy and roadmap artifacts.
You coach and enable Product Managers and Product Owners in competitive intelligence, data analysis, and insight storytelling, as well as in the targeted use of AI‑based agents as digital co‑workers to automate recurring analyses and accelerate data‑driven product decisions.
You define relevant strategy and product KPIs (e.g. adoption of digital services, conversion, retention, service margin/CM, cost‑to‑serve, NPS, support drivers) and support the setup of dashboards and reporting logic together with Data/Steering.
You independently manage the eMobility product portfolio (@home & @work) across the entire product lifecycle, take on (partial) project leadership, and ensure the operational ownership of products and services in close collaboration with internal teams, supplier management, and the sales organization.


What makes you stand out


You hold a completed degree in Business, Technology, Data/Analytics, Engineering, or a comparable qualification.
You have at least 2 years of professional experience in product management, product strategy, competitive intelligence, business analytics, or a similar strategic‑analytical role.
You bring proven experience in analyzing new markets, competitors, and product landscapes, and in deriving sound strategic recommendations.
You have a strong understanding of digital products and services and their scalability across countries and markets.
You have experience in developing and evolving product or digital strategies, including roadmaps, business cases, and decision documents for senior management.


We are looking forward to your application and to applicants who enrich our diverse culture! Regardless of age, gender, origin and sexual identity and orientation. Severely disabled applicants will be given preference if equally qualified. This position can be full-time or part-time (min. 30h/week). DKV Mobility is looking for the best talents and knows that these are not always available on a full-time basis. Many of our employees work part-time or in flexible working models. Please talk to us about the flexibility you need during the application process.

Why DKV Mobility? Here are five good reasons...

At DKV Mobility, we are team players - because we are only successful together! #teamofteams

You should feel welcome with us from the very beginning!

We've Been Growing For About 90 Years

How we do it? We keep adapting our products and business model to meet changing customer needs. That's how we stay mobile and master every challenge the future holds.

There are also many other good reasons to work at DKV Mobility. For example, we offer you comprehensive company health management, parent-child offices (from 2023) and support you in leasing your eBike through our partner Jobrad!

We attach great importance to work-life balance.

We stand for the compatibility of family and career! That's why we offer flexible working hours and family-friendly working time models. In addition, we rely on a balanced mix of on-site meetings and home office.

We support you in your development

We offer you optimal conditions to familiarize yourself so that you can quickly find your way around and become a part of the team! To further your personal development, we offer you access to a modern learning environment - independent of time and location. This way you can also face the challenges of tomorrow!

We are committed to a net-zero future

After reaching our Green Pledge climate target in 2023 by reducing carbon emissions in our own business operations by 50.4% compared to the base year 2019, we set ourselves ambitious net-zero climate targets. The targets have been validated by the Science Based Targets initiative. By 2050, DKV Mobility commits to reach net-zero greenhouse gas emissions across the value chain from a 2022 base year. You want to take climate action? Follow us on our road to net-zero.

We are a certified employer

Our employees trust us. As an employer, we regularly receive awards from independent institutes, e.g. as Top Employer Germany and as Great Place to Work!

Have we made you curious? Then we are looking forward to your application! If you still have open questions then please contact Cristina Moraru via Cristina.Moraru@dkv-mobility.com.

This role is a unique opportunity to have a profound impact on the future of digital content protection, working closely with our CTO, Head of Engineering, and business stakeholders as part of the Product Team to develop cutting-edge solutions that address the challenges of brand protection.




🚀 Your Role: Beyond the High-Level

As a Product Manager, you will support the definition, developm
description_full:
At Ceartas, we stand at the forefront of AI-powered brand protection, copyright law, and digital security, dedicated to safeguarding the integrity of content creators, brands, and enterprises worldwide. As we accelerate our growth and expand our market to Enterprise, we're seeking a Product Manager/Product Owner who is passionate about driving product strategy, innovation, and user-centric solutions. This role is a unique opportunity to have a profound impact on the future of digital content protection, working closely with our CTO, Head of Engineering, and business stakeholders as part of the Product Team to develop cutting-edge solutions that address the challenges of brand protection.




🚀 Your Role: Beyond the High-Level

As a Product Manager, you will support the definition, development, and delivery of product features that empower content creators and improve their end-to-end experience. This role is fully focused on the Content Creator side of the product, working closely with senior product managers, engineering, design, and content stakeholders to ensure features are well-defined, delivered on time, and continuously improved.




You’ll be hands-on, detail-oriented, and eager to learn—helping translate ideas into clear requirements, keeping delivery on track, and ensuring creator needs are represented throughout the product lifecycle.

Run the Board: Manage sprint boards, tickets, and backlog prioritization, ensuring nothing slips through the cracks and blockers are quickly resolved.
Execute with Precision: Drive sprint rituals (planning, standups, retros) and coordinate cross-team alignment to keep engineering and design moving in sync.
Deliver Features End-to-End: Take concepts from idea to release—writing clear specs, grooming stories, and working closely with developers to ensure smooth handoffs and timely delivery.
Ensure Operational Clarity: Track progress across Jira or similar tools, report status to leadership, and keep the roadmap actionable and current.
Keep Feedback Loops Tight: Gather input from sales, support, and customers to feed into sprint planning and continuous improvement cycles.
Measure and Optimize: Use analytics to track feature success and iterate quickly, ensuring a strong connection between business goals and delivered outcomes.




🔥 Responsibilities

Own and maintain the product backlog, keeping it well-groomed and aligned with both strategic initiatives and urgent business needs.
Lead daily/weekly product rituals (standups, sprint planning, retrospectives, etc.) and ensure alignment between engineering and stakeholders.
Translate business requirements into clear user stories and acceptance criteria, enabling smooth handoff to development teams.
Monitor delivery progress, resolve blockers, and keep all stakeholders updated on timelines, trade-offs, and outcomes.
Partner with design and engineering to ensure high-quality feature delivery that meets user expectations.
Analyze performance metrics post-launch, gather feedback, and iterate to improve outcomes.




🌟 Must-Haves

1–3 years of experience in a product manager, product owner, project, business analyst, or delivery support role (or strong internship / trainee experience).
Basic understanding of Agile / Scrum methodologies and sprint-based delivery.
Experience writing or contributing to user stories, acceptance criteria, or requirements.
Familiarity with tools such as Jira, Confluence, Notion, or similar.
Strong organisational skills with attention to detail and follow-through.
Clear written and verbal communication skills.
Interest in creator tools, content platforms, or digital media workflows.
Eagerness to learn, take feedback, and grow in a product management career.




👀 Nice To Haves

Exposure to creator platforms, media tools, or content production workflows.
Experience working with cross-functional teams (engineering, design, content).
Basic data literacy (ability to interpret simple metrics, dashboards, or reports).
Experience supporting roadmap planning or release coordination.
Familiarity with usability testing, feedback collection, or post-launch analysis.
Previous experience in a SaaS, media, or creator-focused product environment.




🔥 What We Offer

Supportive leadership committed to your personal and professional development.
Hybrid role with flexibility to work from home or the office.
25 paid days off per year, plus public holidays and your birthday!
A culture of innovation and continuous learning.
A vibrant startup environment with a collaborative team.
Home Office Allowance and all the tech you need, including a brand-new MacBook Air.
Employee recognition and reward program to celebrate your contributions.
An inclusive workplace that celebrates diversity and equal opportunity.




Dublin or Berlin preferred, open to any candidate within the EU




#EU

As Europe’s No.1 e-pharmacy Redcare Pharmacy is powered by passionate teams and cutting-edge innovation. We strive to create a healthy collaborative work environment where every employee feels valued and inspired to contribute to our vision “Until every human has their health”. If you’re seeking a career that offers purpose and aligns with your values join us and start your #Redcareer today.

Job Description

About your task
description_full:
About Redcare Pharmacy:

As Europe’s No.1 e-pharmacy Redcare Pharmacy is powered by passionate teams and cutting-edge innovation. We strive to create a healthy collaborative work environment where every employee feels valued and inspired to contribute to our vision “Until every human has their health”. If you’re seeking a career that offers purpose and aligns with your values join us and start your #Redcareer today.

About the role:

This is an exciting opportunity to take ownership of product initiatives with a strong data-driven mindset across procurement, finance, and supply chain domains. Working within cross-functional product teams, you will shape data product solutions that drive impactful decisions and scalable improvements across the organization.

Job Description

About your tasks:


Own and drive data product solutions across procurement, finance, and supply chain, translating business needs into impactful outcomes
Leverage data analysis and insights to guide product decisions, prioritize features, and continuously improve product performance
Collaborate with cross-functional product teams and stakeholders, ensuring alignment between product strategy and operational excellence
Use Jira and Confluence to manage product backlogs, enhance transparency, and streamline communication across teams


Qualifications

About you:


Proven experience as a Product Manager or Product Owner with a strong analytical and data-driven mindset
Solid understanding of procurement, finance, or supply chain domains and how data can optimize them
Hands-on experience with Jira and Confluence in agile product environments
You enjoy working at the intersection of business, product, and data, turning insights into scalable data product solutions


Additional Information

About your benefits:

In order to provide you with the best possible support for your individual needs - whether it‘s living a healthy life, having enough time for your family, or developing your skills - we offer a wide range of different, site-specific benefits:


Work from Home: If your job does not require you to be present in the office, we can arrange the place you work from individually - even for up to 20 days a year anywhere in the EU.
Personal development: Grow! We support and encourage your individual development through various in- and external trainings.
Redcare events: We promote teambuilding through creative team events, and celebrate our successes together at regularly scheduled parties.
Corporate pension plan: We offer a company pension scheme and have a dedicated external consultant to offer you the best guidance and advice.
Mental Health: Get quick and professional help from psychologists of nilo if you feel overwhelmed in private or professional life. Anonymous and free of charge.

title: Global Service Product Manager (m/w/d)
description_snippet:
Von der Lebensmittelverpackung bis zum Recycling von Kunststoff.
Unsere Vakuum- und Überdrucklösungen finden sich in allen Lebens- und Industriebereichen.

description_full:
What we achieve together

In your role as Customer Success Manager (f/m/d) Digital B2C Solutions, you will actively shape how our digital products and services support millions of users from the very first installation, ensuring a reliable, intuitive, and efficient experience. In the Digital B2C Solutions department, we develop applications such as the myVaillant App, the myVaillant Web Portal, as well as services like EnergiePlus and OptimierungPlus.




The continuous improvement of our digital customer journeys is driven with a clear focus on user needs and measurable added value
Insights from analytics tools, user studies, and direct customer feedback are systematically analyzed through tools, studies, and interviews and translated into concrete improvements
You develop cross‑product customer journeys that deliver an outstanding and intuitive customer experience
As an advocate for the end‑customer target group, you work closely and collaboratively with the Product Owners to embed and drive the user perspective
Using your strong business and technology understanding, you regularly measure, analyze, and transparently report customer satisfaction
You plan and coordinate product launches and releases and act as the central point of contact for all country organizations




What makes us successful together

Solid professional experience in the field of customer centricity, with a strong user focus and the motivation to continuously improve digital products for millions of our end customers internationally
Very good user knowledge of Jira, Confluence, MS Office, Google Analytics, and HotJar
Extensive experience in international and interdisciplinary collaboration within complex organizational structures
In‑depth expertise in methods and tools for analyzing and optimizing user experiences, combined with the motivation to apply these tools in day‑to‑day work
User‑centered working style, strong communication skills, creativity, and confidence in managing a wide range of stakeholders in a structured manner, including project management experience
Qualification: Master’s degree in business administration, engineering, computer science, or a comparable qualification, as well as fluency in English and good German language skills

What you can count on

Hybrid Work: We offer our employees the opportunity to work on a hybrid basis. There is also the option to temporarily work from a country within the European Union
Flexible working hours: We offer flexible working hours so that family and career can be coordinated individually
Salary: We offer an attractive remuneration package in accordance with the NRW IG Metall collective wage agreement, including vacation pay and Christmas bonus
You will work in a fast growing, agile and very dynamic team that challenges established routines and helps transforming the Vaillant Group to a data informed business
Development: Our development programs "GROW, EVOLVE, LEAD and EXCEL" prepare high potentials for the next career step




What makes us special

We take care of a better climate. In every home and our environment. As a successful family business, we have been living up to this claim for over 150 years. We are one of the world's leading providers of heat pumps, digital services and efficient gas heating appliances and offer energy-saving solutions.

You will find sustainability everywhere at the Vaillant Group. In the office, at the production sites and on the road. Around 16,000 employees from over 70 countries are committed to this every day. As an international team, we take responsibility - for our future and that of our planet. We promote your personal development so that you can act with passion and together we can ensure a better climate.

Become part of the Vaillant Group and help us shape the future of heating!




We promote equity and do not tolerate any form of discrimination. We value the uniqueness of each individual and encourage all people to apply.

The Search at eBay team is responsible for the search page that drives a large part of eBay’s cor
description_full:
At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader — we’re changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We’re committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts.

Our customers are our compass, authenticity thrives, bold ideas are welcome, and everyone can bring their unique selves to work — every day. We're in this together, sustaining the future of our customers, our company, and our planet.

Join a team of passionate thinkers, innovators, and dreamers — and help us connect people and build communities to create economic opportunity for all.

The Search at eBay team is responsible for the search page that drives a large part of eBay’s core marketplace business. The Search team strives to build an experience that enables users to easily explore, find, and buy what they want at the best value through an engaging, frictionless, and trusted Search experience, helping them make confident purchase decisions.

In this role, you will be responsible to building high quality advertising solutions for Search. Your expertise will drive the development of AI-driven features that improve product discovery, engagement, and overall ad quality. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in AI/ML technologies, along with a passion for applying these skills to redefine the way customers interact with our platform.

What You Will Accomplish


Lead the product strategy and roadmap for improving advertising quality on search
Be a strategic problem solver and able to synthesize data from multiple sources (including analytics, user research, marketing research, and design) to identify key customer unmet needs, key solutions that can address the needs and build product vision with search item tiles
You will work closely with a cross-functional team of engineering, design, analytics, product marketing, and user research to deliver these products
You will lead the execution of your roadmap by working with data science, engineering, and analytics teams
Build MVPs, iterate fast and be the champion of execution excellence
Conduct AB tests for launch candidates and work with analytics teams to measure the impact on success metrics



What You Will Bring


3+ years of Product Management experience
Experience with search and discovery systems, including familiarity with ranking models, search algorithms, and semantic search
Familiarity with pay per click search advertising systems
Strong analytic skills and ability to synthesize data from multiple sources
Passionate advocate for user, and has confirmed results in achieving superb user experience within tight constraints
Demonstrated leadership ability, self-motivated and directed, entrepreneurial ability to innovate quickly



Additional Details

eBay is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, and disability, or other legally protected status. If you have a need that requires accommodation, please contact us at talent@ebay.com. We will make every effort to respond to your request for accommodation as soon as possible. View our accessibility statement to learn more about eBay's commitment to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities.

We use cookies to enhance your experience and may use AI tools for administrative tasks in the hiring process. To learn how we handle your personal data and use AI responsibly, please visit our Talent Privacy Notice, Privacy Center, and AI Hiring Guidelines.
